name: manage_incidents
description: Create, update, and resolve incidents on a status page. Set impact level, affected components, and status. Supports scheduled maintenances and notification delivery control.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the status page. Found in the Statuspage dashboard URL.

parameters.name: incident[name]
parameters.description: Title of the incident. Should briefly describe the issue.

parameters.name: incident[status]
parameters.description: Current status: 'investigating', 'identified', 'monitoring', 'resolved' for realtime incidents. 'scheduled', 'in_progress', 'verifying', 'completed' for maintenances.

parameters.name: incident[body]
parameters.description: The update message body describing the current situation.
parameters.example: We are investigating reports of database connectivity issues affecting the API.

parameters.name: incident[component_ids][]
parameters.description: Array of component IDs affected by this incident.

parameters.name: incident[deliver_notifications]
parameters.description: Whether to send notifications to subscribers. Defaults to true.

incident.name: Database connectivity issues
incident.body: We are investigating reports of database connectivity issues affecting the API.

incident_updates.body: We are investigating reports of database connectivity issues affecting the API.
